texto: There is no such a thing as missing the train of your life! Life is very rich and very generous
autor: it always offers you new opportunities! Already-missed will soon be substituted by the not-missed-yet!
explicacao: Citação de it always offers you new opportunities! Already-missed will soon be substituted by the not-missed-yet! sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “There is no such a thing as missing the train of your life! Life is very rich and very generous” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
